profile.name: Alex Mercer
profile.title: Senior Systems Architect & Full-Stack Cybernetic Engineer
profile.bio: Building scalable decentralized systems, real-time AI pipelines, and high-performance web applications with futuristic UI/UX engineering. Passionate about distributed computing, quantum security, and next-gen frontend performance.
profile.status: Available for Select Contracts & High-Impact Roles

capabilities.title: Distributed Systems Architecture
capabilities.description: Engineered with zero memory overhead, high concurrency, and low latency micro-kernel isolation.

capabilities.title: Generative AI & LLM Workflows
capabilities.description: Real-time prompt interpolation, custom fine-tuned LoRA integrations, and browser-accelerated WebGL pipelines.

capabilities.title: Full-Stack Frontend & UI Engineering
capabilities.description: Single-page React architectures, Tailwind CSS token systems, and responsive dark-mode first design.

projects.title: QuantumGuard Security Mesh
projects.summary: Real-time threat monitoring and cryptographic access enforcement system with automated anomaly isolation.
projects.description: QuantumGuard is a zero-trust network monitoring matrix engineered to analyze sub-millisecond network telemetry. Utilizing eBPF micro-probes and an adaptive AI intrusion detection model, it detects unusual socket activity, mitigates DDoS vectors dynamically, and renders real-time telemetry dashboards.

projects.title: NeuralCanvas AI Image Studio
projects.summary: Browser-based generative AI workstation with multi-layer canvas, in-painting, and node graph pipeline.
projects.description: A cutting-edge browser workspace allowing digital artists to interface directly with SDXL and custom fine-tuned LoRA models. Built with a high-performance WebGL acceleration layer and node-based canvas, supporting real-time masking, prompt parameter interpolation, and batch export.

projects.title: HyperDrive Autonomous OS Core
projects.summary: Microkernel-inspired process manager and real-time task scheduler tailored for high-speed edge computing nodes.
projects.description: HyperDrive OS is designed to address multi-tenant edge workload isolation with zero memory overhead. Current development focuses on lock-free queue concurrency, dynamic memory paging, and a web-based real-time telemetry kernel inspector.

projects.title: CyberGrid Decentralized Storage
projects.summary: Peer-to-peer encrypted file distribution system with content-addressable storage and auto-healing nodes.
projects.description: A resilient distributed filesystem protocol allowing chunked, AES-256 encrypted file blocks to be replicated across decentralized storage nodes. Features an intuitive glassmorphic storage explorer and bandwidth analytics monitor.

projects.title: Holographic UI Component System
projects.summary: A futuristic 3D augmented-reality themed web UI toolkit featuring spatial sound synthesis and glass refraction.
projects.description: An ambitious next-generation component design system. It will provide developers with drop-in futuristic UI elements including glowing neon buttons, spatial audio triggers, reactive particles, and 3D depth-layer cards.

projects.title: SwarmProtocol Robotics Orchestration
projects.summary: Low-latency coordination platform for multi-agent autonomous drone and rover fleets.
projects.description: A centralized dashboard and event bus architecture for mapping real-time spatial positioning, pathfinding collision prevention, and dynamic battery re-allocation among autonomous multi-rotor hardware nodes.
